title: sorbus alnifolia f. tiliifolia
intro: Sorbus alnifolia f. tiliifolia, also known as Korean Mountain Ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and red berries. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Sorbus alnifolia f. tiliifolia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
